subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who speaketh that which profiteth the world, yet the people remain behind a manifest veil, hearing the Call of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی ینطق بما ینتفع به العالم ولکن القوم فی حجاب مبین یسمعون ندآء الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
